tags.name: Old WV 93
tags.note: Road has been closed off and replaced by the new Corridor H (US-48/WV-93) just to the south in November 2015. Please delete once newer Bing Imagery is available and shows the newer highway to prevent armchair mappers re-adding the 'old' highway.
